title: Iria fimbristyloides
intro: Iria fimbristyloides, also known as Irioda or Iriodi, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for various ailments such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. Iria fimbristyloides contains bioactive constituents such as flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its therapeutic properties. The plant is commonly used in traditional herbal medicine and is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, as well as being used topically in the form of creams or ointments to treat skin conditions and wounds.
